content.json:
# Trustee Filter Metrics

Success metrics for trustee filter usage and performance on the Trustee Management page.

**Instrumented events:**
- `Trustee District Filter Changed` — fired on any selection change; dimensions: `isDefault`; measurements: `selectedCount`, `resultCount`, `chapterCount`, `divisionCount`
- `Trustee District Filter Cleared` — fired when user clicks Clear (restores defaults)
- `Trustee Division Filter Cleared` — fired when user explicitly clears all division selections
- `Trustee Chapter Filter Changed` — fired on any chapter selection change; dimensions: `selectedChapterValues`; measurements: `selectedCount`, `resultCount`, `districtCount`
- `Trustee Name Filter Changed` — fired after each debounced search API call (2+ chars); dimensions: `hasDistrictFilter`; measurements: `queryLength`, `resultCount`, `districtCount`, `chapterCount`, `searchResponseMs`, `sessionSearchCount`
- `Trustee Name Filter Cleared` — fired when user clears the name input; measurements: `queryLength`, `sessionSearchCount`
- `Trustee List Loaded` — fired when trustee data first renders; measurements: `trusteeCount`, `loadMs`

---
## Usage Tracking
How frequently users modify the district filter and what they do with it.

content.title: % of Page Visits Where Filter Was Changed
Avg Filter Changes per Page Visit
% of Trustee Page Visits That Cleared Default Selection

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Trustee District Filter Changed"
| where tostring(customDimensions.isDefault) != "true"
| extend resultCount = toint(customMeasurements.resultCount)
| extend ResultBucket = case(
    resultCount == 0, "0 trustees",
    resultCount <= 5, "1–5 trustees",
    resultCount <= 10, "6–10 trustees",
    resultCount <= 20, "11–20 trustees",
    resultCount <= 50, "21–50 trustees",
    "51+ trustees"
  )
| summarize FilterApplications = count() by ResultBucket
| order by ResultBucket asc
content.title: Trustee Count Distribution After Filtering

content.json:
---
## Division Filter Usage
How frequently users use the division filter relative to the district filter, and whether users tend to refine by division after selecting a district.

content.query:
let TrusteePageVisits = pageViews 
    | where timestamp {TimeRange} 
    | where url contains "/trustees" 
    | project operation_Id;
let FilterEvents = customEvents
    | where timestamp {TimeRange}
    | where name == "Trustee District Filter Changed"
    | extend divCount = toint(customMeasurements.divisionCount)
    | project operation_Id, divCount;
TrusteePageVisits
| join kind=leftouter FilterEvents on operation_Id
| summarize 
    TotalPageViews = dcount(operation_Id),
    VisitsWithDistrictFilter = dcountif(operation_Id, isnotempty(divCount)),
    VisitsWithDivisionFilter = dcountif(operation_Id, divCount > 0)
| project 
    DistrictFilterRate = round(VisitsWithDistrictFilter * 100.0 / TotalPageViews, 1),
    DivisionFilterRate = round(VisitsWithDivisionFilter * 100.0 / TotalPageViews, 1)
content.title: District vs. Division Filter Usage Rate (% of Page Visits)

content.query:
let Sessions = customEvents
    | where timestamp {TimeRange}
    | where name == "Trustee District Filter Changed"
    | project operation_Id, 
              // We'll count everything for now to verify the math
              isDistrictEvent = true, 
              hasDivision = toint(customMeasurements.divisionCount) > 0;
Sessions
| summarize 
    TotalDistrictSessions = dcountif(operation_Id, isDistrictEvent),
    DistrictAndDivisionSessions = dcountif(operation_Id, isDistrictEvent and hasDivision)
| project 
    ['% of District Sessions with Division Filter'] = iff(TotalDistrictSessions > 0, round(DistrictAndDivisionSessions * 100.0 / TotalDistrictSessions, 1), 0.0),
    ['Total District Sessions (Denominator)'] = TotalDistrictSessions
content.title: % of District Filter Sessions That Also Used Division Filter

titleContent.columnMatch: % of District Sessions with Division Filter

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Trustee District Filter Changed"
| extend divisionCount = toint(customMeasurements.divisionCount)
| extend selectedCount = toint(customMeasurements.selectedCount)
| extend FilterMode = case(
    selectedCount == 0, "No district",
    divisionCount == 0, "District only",
    "District + Division"
  )
| summarize Events = count() by FilterMode
| order by Events desc
content.title: Filter Mode: District Only vs. District + Division
% of Page Visits Where Division Filter Was Explicitly Cleared

content.query:
let DistrictSessions = customEvents
    | where timestamp {TimeRange}
    | where name == "Trustee District Filter Changed"
    | extend selectedCount = toint(customMeasurements.selectedCount)
    | extend divisionCount = toint(customMeasurements.divisionCount)
    | where selectedCount > 0
    | summarize
        EarliestDistrictOnlyTime = minif(timestamp, divisionCount == 0),
        EarliestDivisionTime = minif(timestamp, divisionCount > 0)
    by operation_Id;
let TotalDistrictSessions = toscalar(DistrictSessions | count);
let DivisionAfterDistrictSessions = toscalar(
    DistrictSessions
    | where isnotempty(EarliestDistrictOnlyTime) and isnotempty(EarliestDivisionTime)
    | where EarliestDivisionTime > EarliestDistrictOnlyTime
    | count
);
print
    TotalDistrictSessions = TotalDistrictSessions,
    DivisionAfterDistrictSessions = DivisionAfterDistrictSessions,
    Rate = round(iif(TotalDistrictSessions > 0, todouble(DivisionAfterDistrictSessions) / todouble(TotalDistrictSessions) * 100, 0.0), 1)
content.title: % of District Sessions That Subsequently Refined by Division

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name in ("Trustee District Filter Changed", "Trustee Division Filter Cleared")
| summarize
    DistrictModifications = countif(name == "Trustee District Filter Changed" and tostring(customDimensions.isDefault) != "true"),
    DivisionActive = countif(name == "Trustee District Filter Changed" and toint(customMeasurements.divisionCount) > 0),
    DivisionClears = countif(name == "Trustee Division Filter Cleared")
    by Day = bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by Day asc
content.title: Division Filter Activity Over Time

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Trustee District Filter Changed"
| where toint(customMeasurements.selectedCount) > 0
| summarize
    DistrictOnlySessions = dcountif(operation_Id, toint(customMeasurements.divisionCount) == 0),
    DistrictAndDivisionSessions = dcountif(operation_Id, toint(customMeasurements.divisionCount) > 0)
    by Day = bin(timestamp, 1d)
| extend TotalDistrictSessions = DistrictOnlySessions + DistrictAndDivisionSessions
| extend DivisionUsageRate = round(iif(TotalDistrictSessions > 0, todouble(DistrictAndDivisionSessions) / todouble(TotalDistrictSessions) * 100, 0.0), 1)
| project Day, DivisionUsageRate, TotalDistrictSessions
| order by Day asc
content.title: Daily Division Filter Usage Rate (% of District Sessions with Division Active)

content.json:
---
## Chapter Filter Usage
How frequently users apply the chapter filter and what results they see.

content.title: % of Page Visits Where Chapter Filter Was Used
Avg Chapter Filter Changes per Page Visit

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Trustee Chapter Filter Changed"
| extend selectedCount = toint(customMeasurements.selectedCount)
| summarize FilterApplications = count() by selectedCount
| order by selectedCount asc
content.title: Count of # of Chapters Selected

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Trustee Chapter Filter Changed"
| extend resultCount = toint(customMeasurements.resultCount)
| extend ResultBucket = case(
    resultCount == 0, "0 trustees",
    resultCount <= 5, "1–5 trustees",
    resultCount <= 10, "6–10 trustees",
    resultCount <= 20, "11–20 trustees",
    resultCount <= 50, "21–50 trustees",
    "51+ trustees"
  )
| summarize FilterApplications = count() by ResultBucket
| order by ResultBucket asc
content.title: Trustee Count Distribution After Chapter Filtering

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name in ("Trustee District Filter Changed", "Trustee District Filter Cleared", "Trustee Division Filter Cleared", "Trustee Chapter Filter Changed", "Trustee Name Filter Changed", "Trustee Name Filter Cleared")
| summarize
    DistrictModifications = countif(name == "Trustee District Filter Changed" and tostring(customDimensions.isDefault) != "true"),
    DefaultClears = countif(name == "Trustee District Filter Cleared"),
    DivisionActive = countif(name == "Trustee District Filter Changed" and toint(customMeasurements.divisionCount) > 0),
    DivisionClears = countif(name == "Trustee Division Filter Cleared"),
    ChapterModifications = countif(name == "Trustee Chapter Filter Changed"),
    NameSearches = countif(name == "Trustee Name Filter Changed"),
    NameSearchClears = countif(name == "Trustee Name Filter Cleared")
    by Day = bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by Day asc
content.title: Filter Activity Over Time (District + Division + Chapter + Name)

content.json:
---
## Chapter Filter Popularity
% of trustee page visits where each chapter was selected, based on `selectedChapterValues` in the `Trustee Chapter Filter Changed` event.

content.query:
let TotalVisits = toscalar(
    pageViews
    | where timestamp {TimeRange}
    | where url contains "/trustees"
    | summarize by operation_Id
    | count
);
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Trustee Chapter Filter Changed"
| extend selectedChapterValues = tostring(customDimensions.selectedChapterValues)
| where isnotempty(selectedChapterValues)
| mv-expand Chapter = split(selectedChapterValues, ",")
| extend ChapterLabel = case(
    Chapter == "7", "Chapter 7",
    Chapter == "11", "Chapter 11",
    Chapter == "11-subchapter-v", "Chapter 11 Subchapter V",
    Chapter == "12", "Chapter 12",
    Chapter == "13", "Chapter 13",
    tostring(Chapter)
  )
| summarize VisitCount = dcount(operation_Id) by ChapterLabel
| extend PctOfVisits = round(todouble(VisitCount) / todouble(TotalVisits) * 100, 1)
| order by PctOfVisits desc
content.title: % of Page Visits by Chapter Selected

content.json:
---
## Combined Filter Usage
% of trustee page visits where both district and chapter filters were active at the same time, and the average number of combined-filter events per visit.

content.title: Combined Filter Usage (District + Chapter)

content.json:
---
## Name Search Usage
How frequently users search by name, average query length, and combination with district filter.

content.title: % of Page Visits Where Name Search Was Used
Avg Name Searches per Page Visit

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Trustee Name Filter Changed"
| extend queryLength = toint(customMeasurements.queryLength)
| where isnotnull(queryLength)
| summarize
    AvgQueryLength = round(avg(queryLength), 1),
    P50QueryLength = round(todouble(percentile(queryLength, 50)), 0),
    P95QueryLength = round(todouble(percentile(queryLength, 95)), 0),
    SampleCount = count()
| project
    ['Avg Length'] = AvgQueryLength,
    ['P50 Length'] = P50QueryLength,
    ['P95 Length'] = P95QueryLength,
    ['Sample Count'] = SampleCount
content.title: Search Query Length (chars)
% of Name Searches with District Filter Active

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Trustee Name Filter Changed"
| extend resultCount = toint(customMeasurements.resultCount)
| extend ResultBucket = case(
    resultCount == 0, "0 trustees",
    resultCount <= 5, "1–5 trustees",
    resultCount <= 10, "6–10 trustees",
    resultCount <= 20, "11–20 trustees",
    resultCount <= 50, "21–50 trustees",
    "51+ trustees"
  )
| summarize SearchCount = count() by ResultBucket
| order by ResultBucket asc
content.title: Trustee Count Distribution After Name Search

content.json:
---
## Name Search Performance
Search API response time as measured from the client (debounce-fire to response received).

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Trustee Name Filter Changed"
| extend searchResponseMs = todouble(customMeasurements.searchResponseMs)
| where isnotnull(searchResponseMs)
| summarize
    P50Ms = round(percentile(searchResponseMs, 50), 0),
    P95Ms = round(percentile(searchResponseMs, 95), 0),
    SampleCount = count()
| project
    ['P50 Response (ms)'] = P50Ms,
    ['P95 Response (ms)'] = P95Ms,
    ['Sample Count'] = SampleCount
content.title: Name Search API Response Time

content.json:
---
## Performance Tracking
Filter response time and page load time for the trustee list.

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Trustee List Loaded"
| extend loadMs = todouble(customMeasurements.loadMs)
| where isnotnull(loadMs)
| summarize
    P50Ms = round(percentile(loadMs, 50), 0),
    P95Ms = round(percentile(loadMs, 95), 0),
    SampleCount = count()
| project
    ['P50 Load (ms)'] = P50Ms,
    ['P95 Load (ms)'] = P95Ms,
    ['Sample Count'] = SampleCount
content.title: Trustee List Page Load Time
